post: I don't even think I am necessarily "worrying," though...my mind is just freaking out 24/7.

pre: I am definitely an introvert, so I love, need to be alone...but I do get lonely.
text: I am never relaxed, though; always restless.
post: I think I start to think that maybe I'll feel better if I'm around people?

pre: I ended up loving it as a hobby.
text: I'm a pretty anxious person and fidget with my hands quite a lot.
post: I don't use any nicotine in my juice but it keeps my hands busy and steady.

pre: Honestly, I like the fact that she can answer any question I have.
text: I have been so calm during certain stressful moments.
post: I can't speak for the labor part yet, but I can't imagine not having a doula.

pre: I wish I could game.
text: I get nervous like I should be doing something else.

pre: I found meditation helped me slow down so I could focus more than concentrate... if that makes sense.
text: I tend to rush a lot and constantly be in an anxious state about the silliest things like cooking, but meditating (when I do it regularly) teaches me to calm down a lot.
post: It has my mind going in slow motion (which would be "normal motion" for other people) which does help me focus on particular tasks better.

pre: I'm suddenly feeling really panicky, really uncomfortable in my body and really uncomfortable in my environment (home, my bedroom - my haven!).
text: It's almost restlessness or agitation, like I need to escape and go out for a run or literally run away or something.
post: I don't think I've ever felt this before.

pre: Pretending to be so self-assured has become habit now, and I'm terrified I might be breaking out of that habit.
text: I'm feeling overly anxious and I don't know how to stop it.

pre: And again and again.
text: Idk ugh i just get really agitated doing nothingg but i dont have the energy to do anything actually meaningful
I'm always anxious too.
post: I've learned that you kinda give future you a little shove from the present moment with a thumbs up and smirk like "don't forget you will come back".

pre: I'm sure the dreams that make me feel like I'm not even asleep, going to the bathroom so often, and now this incessant itching aren't helping.
text: I have the usual side effects of restlessness.
post: My ears started ringing once last week (which I noticed because it was weird for me.. but only happened once).

pre: I do feel more in control now though.
text: I also feel a lot more relaxed and less tense everyday.
post: * I've been noticing random performance swings in my speaking abilities.

pre: see, most of the times its my highs that get in the way of me doing work.
text: I get too hyper and i wanna move around.
post: I dont wanna be sitting down in a desk all day.

pre: Before I begin I should come out and say that I have an agenda in mindfulness and meditation.
text: I'm sick of feeling anxious.
post: It's a feeling that severely limits me as a person and my ability to be creative and enjoy life in general... I say this because I know that meditation in general is simply about "being", and I try to connect with that state during each session, but maybe with such a strong agenda, I'm straying from where I should be...

pre: I tried so many times myself to sit down and read, and i i've tried so many different books.
text: But i never manage to finish them, because i get restless and need to move or do something else at the same time.
post: Then again, nothing against reading - and i envy those who are able to complete book by book and still love it as much everytime they read something.

text: As of lately I've had a lot of stress and anxiety.
post: Most of it stems from school but it just builds and builds until it feels like it's too much.

text: I have extreme stress and anxiety which makes it difficult for me to deal with stressful situations.
post: I started talking to a guy that I've known for about 4 years but never really got to know well, we were more acquaintances than friends really.

pre: Anxiety, not even necessarily social anxiety.
text: I'm just anxious as fuck.
post: I'm even anxious about going to talk to someone to get on medication because I'm anxious that they will think I'm just trying to score drugs.

text: I'm feeling stressed and antsy.
post: I have a migraine that won't go away no matter how I treat it.

post: My leg is shaking uncontrollably.

pre: That helped me a bit.
text: I'm a very anxious person too.
I tend to feel frozen and paralyzed when anxious.
post: If it's accompanied by dread or fear, I get a cold sensation around my shoulders that sinks down my back.

text: I have had bad anxiety to the point of regular panic attacks much of my life.
post: I was expecting increased anxiety, but Adderall actually makes me feel calmer.
